title: JFrog Worker
description: Represents a serverless worker in the JFrog Platform that extends platform functionality through synchronized hooks and automation. Workers are TypeScript-based functions that react to JFrog Platform events in a secure, isolated execution environment.

description.description: Human-readable description of the worker's purpose

enabled.description: Whether the worker is currently active

source_code.description: TypeScript source code for the worker

action.description: The JFrog Platform event that triggers this worker

filter_criteria.description: Criteria for filtering which events trigger the worker

repo_keys.description: Repository keys to scope the worker to

secrets.description: Encrypted secrets accessible to the worker at runtime

value.description: Secret value (write-only, not returned in GET)
